changes: Savage Blade: Enmity effect has been increased.
Flash: Enmity effect has been increased.
Heavy Swing: TP cost has been reduced from 70 to 60.
Skull Sunder: Enmity effect has been increased.
Overpower: Enmity effect has been increased.
Spinning Slash: Enmity effect has been increased.
Unleash: Enmity effect has been increased.
Bloodspiller: Potency has been increased from 380 to 400.
Dark arts potency has been increased from 520 to 540.
Troubadour: Now affects both self and nearby party members.

new_content.name: Omega: Deltascape
new_content.description: A new raid dungeon for eight players.

new_content.name: The Hunt for Omega
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Into the Deltascape
new_content.description: Entry quest for the Omega: Deltascape raid.

new_content.name: The Anomaly
new_content.description: Quest required for the 'Delta Force' achievement.

new_content.name: Yellow crafters’ scrip and yellow gatherers’ scrip
new_content.description: New currencies obtained at level 70, used to exchange for crafter and gatherer items.

new_content.name: Duty Roulette: Mentor
new_content.description: Updated to include Deltascape V1.0, V2.0, V3.0, and V4.0.

new_content.name: Character Configuration / System Configuration
new_content.description: Added font size options and 'Enlarge system UI' setting (PlayStation®4 only).

housing.name: Stuffed Edda
housing.description: Go ahead. Try and convince yourself that the reason this stuffed doll weighs considerably more than similar toys is because her heart is full to bursting with love.
